content_body:
Thank you for allowing us to engoy this beautiful cabin. We had such an amazing time. The property is glorious and we enjoyed walking down by the river. The weather has been in the low 20s in the morning but has warmed up nicely around the afternoon in November. At night, we enjoyed the music from google and roasting smores. What a memory we will share forever! We visit Blue Ridge at least three times a year, and this was our first visit this year. We couldn't have asked for a better cabin! 

Many thanks from the Baric family! All the way from Bosnia!
title: A Memory We Will Share Forever
